summaryShort: Low-severity solder defect on ECU Alpha at SMT line 2; no corrective action taken yet.
summaryLong: A solder defect was reported on the **Steuerplatine ECU Alpha** produced on **SMT-Bestückungslinie 2**. The defect is classified as a **functional error** with low severity — production is not stopped. The caller suspects the foreman as the root cause and notes the issue should be monitored to prevent recurrence. **No immediate corrective action** has been taken so far.

severity.source: Es ist eher ein kleines Thema.

keywords.source: Es gab einen Lötfehler. Ein funktionaler Fehler. Der Vorarbeiter hat scheiße gesaut.
